name: Puffco Proxy Joystick Cap
summary: This cap is constructed with premium, unbreakable stainless steel and silicone materials for long-lasting use and effortless cleaning.
description: This cap is constructed with premium, unbreakable stainless steel and silicone materials for long-lasting use and effortless cleaning. It effectively blocks reclaim buildup, enhancing your vaping sessions for a more enjoyable experience. The incorporation of a fidget-friendly design adds a playful touch. Compatible with the Proxy for optimal performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
